summary: Critical issues prevent shipping: (1) workflow references Tests/PrLabelAssigner.Tests.ps1 but file missing—entire pipeline fails; (2) actions/checkout@v4 not pinned to SHA (supply-chain risk); (3) no explicit permissions: block (least-privilege violation); (4) missing label-config.json referenced by workflow; (5) AssignPrLabels.ps1 duplicates config parsing at lines ~20-30 and ~45-50 (violates DRY); (6) PowerShell scripts lack Set-StrictMode and $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; (7) test-harness runs locally with Invoke-Pester, not through act as required; (8) tool versions (Go, actionlint, PowerShell modules) unpinned; (9) inline test data hardcoded, not parameterized fixtures. TDD requirement unmet—no visible Pester test cases. Would not execute locally.
